selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

response_raw: {"mode":"llm","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","opinion":"To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is essential to have a robust fact-checking mechanism in place. This can be achieved by using AI-powered tools that can detect and flag false information in real-time. Additionally, social media platforms must invest in hiring human moderators who are trained to identify and remove fake content. Furthermore, users must also be educated on how to identify and report fake content, and how to verify the authenticity of information they come across on social media. response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is essential to have a robust fact-checking mechanism in place. This can be achieved by using AI-powered tools that can detect and flag false information in real-time. Additionally, social media platforms must invest in hiring human moderators who are trained to identify and remove fake content. Furthermore, users must also be educated on how to identify and report fake content, and how to verify the authenticity of information they come across on social media. Finally, governments must pass laws that hold social media companies accountable for failing to remove fake content from their platforms.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: 1. AI-powered tools can detect and flag false information in real-time. 2. Human moderators must be trained to identify and remove fake content. 3. Users must be educated on how to identify and report fake content, and how to verify the authenticity of information they come across on social media. 4. Governments must pass laws that hold social media companies accountable for failing to remove fake content from their platforms.
